title: Die Cast Aluminium Forged Non-Stick Black Frying Pan, 24cm Diameter
features: HIGH-QUALITY – Premium, hard-wearing die-cast aluminium with 3-layer enamel finish crafted with durability in mind
NON-STICK coating saves you time, cook whatever you desire with no worry in mind
Durable yet lightweight design for easy every-day use in the kitchen
SLICK black design would be suitable for all types of kitchens, whether classic or contemporary
description: From the manufacturer Commichef Cast Aluminium Cookware Make at home food preparation easier and more enjoyable with a high quality and affordable piece of Cast Aluminium Cookware from Commichef by Grunwerg. Find the perfect pan for any recipe... Why are Commichef Cast Aluminium Pans perfect for both home and professional kitchens? Durable Crafted from extremely durable die cast aluminium so you can enjoy consistent cooking results with minimal maintenance. These pans are built to withstand every day use making them a long-term investment for any kitchen. Quick Cooking Times Aluminium is around 6 times more conductive than iron or steel meaning this cookware heats up quicker and diffuses heat more efficiently for ultra-fast cooking times. Lightweight This Cast Aluminium Grill Pan is perfect for all your frying, sautéing and grilling needs with a naturally lightweight nature which makes it easier to store, access and handle. Non-Stick The Whitford non-stick lining makes this cookware super easy to clean and reduces the need for oils or fats making for healthier cooking all round. Commichef Cast Aluminium Cookware by Grunwerg Founded in 1945 in Sheffield, the heart of the British steel industry, Grunwerg has been proud to supply the UK professional and domestic markets with our stainless steel houseware products for over 80 years. We pride ourselves in creating products that not only last the test of time but enable you to Live Beautifully . Discover our Commichef cookware ranges : Commichef STACK space saving, stackable pan sets; Commichef Plus professional cookware and Cast Aluminium Cookware casseroles, roasting dishes and all-in-one pans.
